Class Edna

java.lang.Object
de.kleinert.edna.Edna
public class Edna extends Object
The primary interface through which Edna is accessed. Provides methods for reading and writing.

  • Method Summary

    Description

    Equivalent to read(Reader, EdnaOptions) with the options being set to defaultOptions().

    Equivalent to read(String, EdnaOptions, Class) except the input is received lazily from the reader.

  • Method Details

    • defaultOptions

      @NotNull public static @NotNull EdnaOptions defaultOptions()
      Default parsing options specified in the EDN file specification.
      Returns:
      Default options.
      See Also:
      • EdnaOptions.defaultOptions()

    • extendedOptions

      @NotNull public static @NotNull EdnaOptions extendedOptions()
      Default parsing options.
      Returns:
      Default options.
      See Also:
      • EdnaOptions.defaultOptions()

    • read

      @Nullable public static <T> T read(@NotNull @NotNull String text, @Nullable @Nullable EdnaOptions options, @NotNull @NotNull Class<T> castClass)
      Parse text with the given option and then cast the result to the specified type. This method is theoretically equivalent to read(Reader, EdnaOptions, Class) if using a StringReader. But the actual implementation might vary.
      Type Parameters:
      T - Output type. Specified by the class argument.
      Parameters:
      text - Input text.
      options - The options used. If null, defaults to defaultOptions().
      castClass - The expected result class.
      Returns:
      The parsed result.
      Throws:
      ClassCastException - If the output is not convertable to T.

    • read

      @Nullable public static @Nullable Object read(@NotNull @NotNull String text, @Nullable @Nullable EdnaOptions options)
      Equivalent to read(String, EdnaOptions, Class) with the class being set to Object.class.
      Parameters:
      text - Input text.
      options - The options used. If null, defaults to defaultOptions().
      Returns:
      The parsed result.

    • read

      @Nullable public static @Nullable Object read(@NotNull @NotNull String text)
      Equivalent to read(String, EdnaOptions) with the options being set to defaultOptions().
      Parameters:
      text - Input text.
      Returns:
      The parsed result.

    • read

      @Nullable public static <T> T read(@NotNull @NotNull Reader reader, @Nullable @Nullable EdnaOptions options, @NotNull @NotNull Class<T> castClass)
      Equivalent to read(String, EdnaOptions, Class) except the input is received lazily from the reader. Note that this method is not thread-safe. Edna will not be held accountable if the reader is used somewhere else.
      Type Parameters:
      T - Output type. Specified by the class argument.
      Parameters:
      reader - Input.
      options - The options used. If null, defaults to defaultOptions().
      castClass - The expected result class.
      Returns:
      The parsed
      Throws:
      ClassCastException - If the output is not convertable to T.

    • read

      @Nullable public static @Nullable Object read(@NotNull @NotNull Reader reader, @Nullable @Nullable EdnaOptions options)
      Equivalent to read(Reader, EdnaOptions, Class) with the class being set to Object.class.
      Parameters:
      reader - Input reader.
      options - The options used. If null, defaults to defaultOptions().
      Returns:
      The parsed result.
      See Also:
      • read(Reader, EdnaOptions, Class)

    • read

      @Nullable public static @Nullable Object read(@NotNull @NotNull Reader reader)
      Equivalent to read(Reader, EdnaOptions) with the options being set to defaultOptions().
      Parameters:
      reader - Input reader.
      Returns:
      The parsed result.
      See Also:
      • read(Reader, EdnaOptions, Class)

    • stream

      @NotNull public static @NotNull @Unmodifiable Stream<Object> stream(@NotNull @NotNull String text, @Nullable @Nullable EdnaOptions options)
      Creates a stream of objects parsed from an EDN input. The stream terminates if an error or end-of-input is encountered.
      Parameters:
      text - Input text.
      options - The options used. If null, defaults to defaultOptions().
      Returns:
      The parsed results as a lazy stream.

    • stream

      @NotNull public static @NotNull @Unmodifiable Stream<Object> stream(@NotNull @NotNull String text)
      Equivalent to stream(String, EdnaOptions) with the options being set to defaultOptions().
      Parameters:
      text - Input text.
      Returns:
      The parsed result.
